paper_section: §3 Results, abstract claim of universality (Round 2 update)
paper_quote: EML + 1 generates all standard scientific calculator operations.
informal_pl: Aktualizacja parasolowego twierdzenia chunku 045 do 20 spójników, łącznie z 9 pod-świadkami rundy 2 (050, 051, 052, 055, 056, 057, 058, 060) oraz strukturalnym wnioskiem o uniwersalnej minimalności (069).
informal_en: Updates the umbrella theorem of chunk 045 from 11 to 20 conjuncts, including 9 round-2 sub-witnesses (050 div, 051 avg, 052 half, 055 sigmoid, 056 cosh, 057 sinh, 058 tanh, 060 arcosh) and the structural universal-minimality corollary (069).
notes: Self-contained 1225-line proof in EML/Solutions/070_main_completeness_full.lean. Bundles 20 conjuncts: 5 closed-term constants (0, -1, 2, 1/2, e), 3 unary R-functions (-x, 1/x on positives, x^2 on positives), 3 binary R-ops (x+y, x*y, x^y on positives), 6 round-2 R-functions (x/y, avg(x,y), x/2, sigmoid σ, cosh, sinh, tanh, arcosh on √2<x), and the universal-minimality corollary on 2-primitive (constant + binary) calculators. Excluded with reason: 034 (π), 035 (i), 039 (√x): paper-supplementary trees / permanent sorries. 053 (log_x y): upstream uses simp +decide and a bespoke mkDiv accepting negative numerators. 054 (hypot), 059 (arsinh): rely transitively on 039. 061 (artanh) and 062–067 (trig + inverse trig): partial / submitted upstream or rely on a complex grammar. 068 (Wolfram→Calc 3 complex): off-topic — different inductive grammar. Verified by lake env lean (Lean 4.28.0 + Mathlib v4.28.0), exit 0, no sorry / decide / native_decide outside comments.
